member.name: T:Prime.PlatformService.Cs.LruCache`2
member.summary: Represents a thread-safe Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.
member.typeparam: The type of the keys in the cache.
The type of the values in the cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PlatformService.Cs.LruCache`2.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified capacity.
member.param: The maximum number of elements that the cache can hold.
member.exception: Thrown when the capacity is less than or equal to zero.

member.name: M:Prime.PlatformService.Cs.LruCache`2.Get(`0)
member.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified key.
member.param: The key of the value to get.
member.returns: The value associated with the specified key.
member.exception: Thrown when the key is not found in the cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PlatformService.Cs.LruCache`2.Put(`0,`1)
member.summary: Adds the specified key and value to the cache. If the key already exists, updates the value.
member.param: The key of the value to add.

member.name: M:Prime.PlatformService.Cs.LruCache`2.TryGetValue(`0,`1@)
member.summary: Tries to get the value associated with the specified key.
member.param: The key of the value to get.
When this method returns, contains the object from the cache that has the specified key, or the default value of the type if the operation failed.
member.returns: true if the key was found in the cache; otherwise, false.
